NOT REPORTED. SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL HELD ON MAY-18-2022, IN DEPT. 608. SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF MAR-04-2022 REMAINS THE SAME. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT BELLA, KAREN RECOVER FROM APPELLANT AIRBNB, INC. $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $488.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,788.00 NO EXHIBITS FILED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar May-18-2022 Set For Trial On May-18-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 606

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-18-2022 Continued To May-18-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-18-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Justin C. Hsiang, attorney for plaintiff/respondent, Karen Bella, who is also present;
Andrew Kirshenbaum, attorney for defendant/appellant, Airbnb, Inc. is present.

This case comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Andrew Kirshenbaum testifies on behalf of defendant/appellant, Airbnb, Inc. Documentary evidence from the previous trial (Exhibit 6) is referenced. No new evidence is provided.
Karen Bella, plaintiff/respondent testifies on her own behalf.

Justin Hsiang testifies on behalf of plaintiff/respondent, Karen Bella.

Andrew Kirshenbaum testifies on behalf of defendant/appellant, Airbnb, Inc. Documentary evidence from the previous trial (Exhibits 1 and 7) are referenced. No new evidence is provided.

Justin Hsiang testifies on behalf of plaintiff/respondent, Karen Bella.

Karen Bella, plaintiff/respondent, testifies on her own behalf.

Andrew Kirshenbaum testifies on behalf of defendant/appellant, Airbnb, Inc. Documentary evidence from the previous trial is referenced. No new evidence is provided.

Karen Bella, plaintiff/respondent testifies on her own behalf.

The Court discloses that he is an occasional client of Airbnb, Inc.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken UNDER SUBMISSION.

Judge: Gerardo Sandoval; Clerk: Felicia Green; not reported; Dept. 608.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-18-2022 Continued To May-18-22 At 10:35 A.M. In Dept 608

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-27-2022 Continued To May-18-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
